text.title: field-descriptions-as-prompts Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing for whether and how to author a description for a given field.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the field semantics fully self-explanatory from name + type (e.g. `is_deleted: bool`)?

branch.conclusion: Omit description; one less token in the prompt cache.

branch.question: Does a draft description contradict the field name or type?

branch.conclusion: Rename the field; do NOT paper over with a description.

branch.question: Does the field depend on another field generated earlier in the schema?

branch.conclusion: Description must reference the dependency by backtick-wrapped name; covers format + units + the relation.

branch.question: Has the model previously mis-filled this field shape?

branch.conclusion: Description must include the format + units + the specific forbidden pattern observed in the past.
Description covers format + units + 1 edge case; leave forbidden patterns out until evidence emerges.

example.trace: trivial=false, conflict=false, depends_on=true (slug depends on title)

text.example: q-trivial → branch(false) → q-name-conflict → branch(false) → q-depends-on → branch(true) → conclusion(r3-reference-dependent-fields).
